newsSince: Only a director share purchase on June 10, 2026 — a modest insider-confidence signal, not a material event. Next results are interim H1 on August 4, 2026; sentiment described as broadly neutral. No RNS, trading update, M&A, or guidance change since June 9.

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 9; a June 10 director purchase is a minor confidence signal, not evidence. The strict latent-node thesis (actuators/flow control into coolant and water loops) is unchanged and the name remains un-rerated at -5.9% YTD, so residual alpha intact but not improved.
verdicts.bull: Capital-light, high-ROCE actuator/flow-control franchise with optionality into data-center coolant and water loops; insider buying.
verdicts.neutral: Quiet pre-results window; thesis unchanged ahead of Aug 4 interims.
verdicts.bear: Speculative AI link; no concrete data-center coolant orders disclosed.
